query_normalized: predicting molecular ionization energies with graph neural networks chemistry
rationale: The paper proposes a general machine learning method (Gaussian RBF Neural Networks with learnable precision matrices) for interpretability and feature selection on generic tabular data, but it does not address the specific domain of molecular ionization energies, nor does it utilize Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) or molecular graph structures. It fails to meet the criteria for same-mechanism evidence, domain-specific variables, or foundational methodology for the specific intersection of GNNs and
